minecraft:lore: {"text": "📊 武器等级: ", "color": "white", "italic": false, "extra": [{"text": "Lv.10", "color": "#FFD700", "bold": true}]}
{"text": "⚔ 战斗等级要求: ", "color": "white", "italic": false, "extra": [{"text": "10", "color": "green", "bold": true}]}
{"text":"💥 伤害: ","color":"white","italic":false,"extra":[{"text":"55-64","color":"red","bold":true}]}
{"text":"☆ 暴击率: ","color":"white","italic":false,"extra":[{"text":"+2%","color":"gold","bold":true}]}
{"text":"⚡ 攻击速度: ","color":"white","italic":false,"extra":[{"text":"1.8/秒","color":"aqua","bold":true}]}
{"text":"⚒ 技能: ","color":"white","italic":false,"extra":[{"text":"火焰斩","color":"#FF4500","bold":true},{"text":" (右键)","color":"gray","bold":false}]}
{"text":"⚒ 特殊技能: ","color":"white","italic":false,"extra":[{"text":"熔岩爆发","color":"#FF6347","bold":true},{"text":" (Shift+右键)","color":"gray","bold":false}]}
{"text": "💰 售价：", "color": "white", "italic": false, "extra": [{"text": "无法出售", "color": "red", "bold": true}]}
{"text": "🔧 物品种类：", "color": "white", "italic": false, "extra": [{"text": "武器 (稀有)", "color": "gold", "bold": true}]}
{"text": "🔨 浸泡在熔岩中淬炼的武士刀。", "color": "gray", "italic": false}
{"text": "🔨 剑刃始终保持着炽热的温度。", "color": "#FF6347", "italic": false}
{"text": "🔨 每次挥击都能感受到火山的力量。", "color": "dark_red", "italic": false}
{"text": "技能 - ", "color": "white", "italic": false, "extra": [{"text": "火焰斩", "color": "#FF4500", "bold": true}]}
{"text": "▪ 效果: ", "color": "gray", "italic": false, "extra": [{"text": "剑刃附着火焰斩击敌人", "color": "white", "bold": false}]}
{"text": "▪ 伤害: ", "color": "gray", "italic": false, "extra": [{"text": "120%武器伤害", "color": "white", "bold": false}]}
{"text": "▪ 燃烧: ", "color": "gray", "italic": false, "extra": [{"text": "每秒10点伤害，持续3秒", "color": "red", "bold": false}]}
{"text": "▪ 冷却时间: ", "color": "gray", "italic": false, "extra": [{"text": "4.0秒", "color": "white", "bold": false}]}
{"text": "特殊技能 - ", "color": "white", "italic": false, "extra": [{"text": "熔岩爆发", "color": "#FF6347", "bold": true}]}
{"text": "▪ 效果: ", "color": "gray", "italic": false, "extra": [{"text": "地面喷发熔岩火柱", "color": "white", "bold": false}]}
{"text": "▪ 伤害: ", "color": "gray", "italic": false, "extra": [{"text": "150%武器伤害", "color": "red", "bold": true}]}
{"text": "▪ 范围: ", "color": "gray", "italic": false, "extra": [{"text": "5格圆形区域", "color": "white", "bold": false}]}
{"text": "▪ 燃烧: ", "color": "gray", "italic": false, "extra": [{"text": "所有敌人燃烧5秒", "color": "red", "bold": false}]}
{"text": "▪ 冷却时间: ", "color": "gray", "italic": false, "extra": [{"text": "12.0秒", "color": "white", "bold": false}]}
